OpsDeck
OpsDeck builds bespoke AI automation tools for UK trades businesses. We find the admin task costing you the most time and make it disappear.
What We Do
We build custom automation tools configured to how your business already works — not generic software you have to adapt to. Every client gets a bespoke build, then pays a monthly retainer for ongoing support and evolution.
Who We Serve
Trades businesses across the UK including landscapers, groundworkers, insulation contractors, scaffolding companies, roofers, and fencing contractors. Particularly suited to trades where quoting is complex — where materials need calculating, specifications matter, and a wrong number costs money.
Products and Services

AI Tools and Automation: single purpose automators, Excel to document converters, AI utilities. From £75/month, setup from £200.
Quote Builder: voice or manual quoting with adaptive memory, AI quote summary, send quotes direct from app. From £100/month, setup from £300.
Quote Builder and Dashboard: everything in Quote Builder plus enquiries management, jobs tab, calendar view, sales overview, profit forecasting. From £150/month, setup from £300.
Full Field Ops Platform: everything in Quote Builder and Dashboard plus team integration, direct messaging, multi-user subscription, bespoke workflow features. From £250/month, setup from £1,000.

Proven Results

Birdwell Insulation Ltd: reduced quote turnaround from 15 minutes per quote done in batches to 30 seconds per quote using the Excel to document converter.
High Point Access Ltd: full field ops platform including custom quoting engine and team management.
Infascape Ltd: Quote Builder and Dashboard used daily in an active landscaping business.

Founder
Rob France. Based in Sheffield. Runs both OpsDeck and Infascape Ltd, a landscaping company. Built OpsDeck because he needed it himself. Partners directly with every customer.
Contact
rob@opsdeck.co.uk

Based in Sheffield, working with trades businesses across the UK.
